name: Butterfinger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Sift together the flour and baking soda (and salt, if using) into a separate bowl.
4. Stir in the chopped butterfingers.
5. Combine the creamed mixture with the sifted flour mixture.
6. Shape the dough into rolls and cover tightly.
7. Chill for several hours or overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Cut each roll into thin slices.
10. Place the slices on a greased cookie sheet.
11. Bake until the edges are brown, about 8-10 minutes.
